title: alchemilla cinerea f. major
intro: Alchemilla cinerea f. major is a variant of the alpine lady's mantle plant, a flowering perennial that belongs to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Alchemilla cinerea f. major include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation and swelling, and promote wound healing. Alchemilla cinerea f. major can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat skin conditions and promote overall skin health.
